name: competlab
description: Competitive intelligence for B2B SaaS — monitor competitors across 5 dimensions including AI Visibility (how ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini rank your brand). 32 MCP tools: project dashboards, alerts, action plans, plus 8 free no-setup tools (sitemap, AI crawlers, tech stack, trust signals, agent adoption).
author: competlab
features: AI Visibility tracking across ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini
5-dimension competitive monitoring (Tech & Trust, Content, Positioning, Pricing, AI Visibility)
AI-generated action plans with prioritized recommendations
Historical trend data and monitoring schedules
Competitive change alerts with severity scoring
Free no-setup tools: sitemap analysis, AI-crawler access check, tech-stack detection (117 rules), trust-signals analysis (34 signals), agent-adoption check (25 checks)
